title: Garlicky Kenyan Mushrooms Biko
description: A hearty and garlicky Kenyan dish featuring shiitake mushrooms, deep-fried to perfection and served with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: Heat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Dust the shiitake mushrooms with flour, shaking off any excess.
Deep-fry the mushrooms in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Remove the mushrooms from the oil and set aside on a paper towel-lined plate.
In the same oil, sauté the onion and tomato until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cornstarch and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the fried mushrooms to the pan and toss to coat with the sauce.
Serve the mushrooms hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables for a balanced meal.
